wikitext:
<!--
FOLLOW THE COMMENTS GIVEN, AND THEN DELETE THIS TEXT AND THE SURROUNDING COMMENTS. 

You're free to change back to visual editor after this.

Any stylistic concerns (eg table of content too messy), or you aren't entirely sure of a relic interaction or anything you need, ping me here (User:Riscuit or User:Vesper-arch) or on Discord.

If you are not sure if a section has relevant information to put, keep the heading and any comments it has so other editors can add it later on.
-->

{{Relic Infobox|Punch Dagger|2}}{{R|Punch Dagger||2}} is a <!-- {{{REFER POINT 3 IF CHARACTER EXCLUSIVE}}} --> {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Upon pickup, you {{2|Enchantments|Enchant}} an attack with {{KW|Momentum||2}} 5, which increases its damage by 5 each time it is played this combat.

<!-------------------------------------------- 

{{{MORE INFORMATION}}} is if the relic is not fully non-ambigious in its description. For example, Mummified Hand has the keyword "this turn". "This turn" actually means "this turn, while in hand", because as soon as a decosted card goes into the discard or draw pile, it goes back to its original cost, even when unplayed.

Replace all the ALL CAPS words with applicable information:

1. RELICNAME: Relic name with proper capitalisation, example: {{Relic Infobox|Akabeko|2}} or {{Relic Infobox|Emotion Chip|2}}. If the relic will not render, check the capitalization at Module:Relics/data.

2. RARITY: Rarity of the relic you're writing information for. Example, {{QueryLink|Relic|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}}. This also covers Shop, Event, Ancient and Special (just the Circlet).



<!-- Relic Infobox is the template that controls the infobox of just your relic and is mandatory. This name will be typed with spaces, and the correct capitalization.

Keyword Infobox controls the infobox of additional effects like Vigor or unique buffs like Pen Nib. If your relic does not have any that need to be shown, remove it entirely.

A lot of keywords aren't in the database yet, so feel free to ask any of us (User:Riscuit, User:Vesper-arch, or User:Aryemlights or just ping us on Discord) to add them.

Some relics may need access to card lists, like Toolbox, example "... choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards ...".
Use eg, {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} to create the link that will only list out Colorless cards. Remember to add |2 as the last parameter to make it link to the Slay the Spire 2 pages.

Some relics (Mark of Pain off the top of my head) may need an extra Infobox for a card or keyword. Use {{Card Infobox|CARDNAME|2}} and/or {{Keyword Infobox|KEYWORDNAME|2}} right after {{Relic Infobox|RELICNAME|2}}, without spaces.
-->

== Sources ==

Can only be bought from the {{2|Merchant}}. Only 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} is available per '''Shop''', even with {{R|The Courier||2}}, since it cannot restock Shop Relics.

== Interactions ==

=== Synergies ===
<!-- Include any relevant synergies here, with bullet points. Otherwise delete this section entirely. -->

* Multi-hit attacks, especially ones where the number of hits scales (such as {{C|Pull from Below||2}}, {{C|Barrage||2}}, and {{C|Radiate||2}})
* Effects that return the card to hand or top of the deck (such as {{C|Thrumming Hatchet||2}}, {{C|Feral||2}}, and {{C|Nostalgia||2}})
* Effects that replay the card (such as {{C|Echo Form||2}} and {{C|Hidden Gem||2}})
<!-- Whenever a different relic is mentioned, use {{R|Card Name||2}} to have its tooltip show up. 
* Cards with {{C|Card Name||2}}
* Potions with {{P|Potion Name||2}}
* Events with {{E|Event Name||2}}

For showing ascension changes, use {{Asc|the ascension number|Label}}, example, 5 or {{Asc|15|3}} Apparitions.

If this relic has several synergies across cards, relics, or even potions, split them into subsections of these types as needed.
-->
